title: Managed Earnings Phenomenon: A firm with a high operating leverage will have what...
summary: Analyze an investment analysis concept related to Managed Earnings Phenomenon.
prompt: A firm with a high operating leverage will have what effect on its earnings?

options.text: High operating leverage means that a firm has a larger proportion of fixed
Firm value increases due to the tax shield

solution: High operating leverage means that a firm has a larger proportion of fixed costs relative to variable costs. Consequently, changes in sales will have a more significant impact on earnings, making them more volatile. This can be a double-edged sword, as it can magnify both profits and losses.
